name: Audiobookshelf
description: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server — search, browse, and track listening progress
author: Crow

env_vars.name: AUDIOBOOKSHELF_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Audiobookshelf API token (Settings > Users > your user)

env_vars.name: AUDIOBOOKSHELF_AUDIOBOOK_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for audiobook files (Docker mode)

env_vars.name: AUDIOBOOKSHELF_PODCAST_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for podcast files (Docker mode)

notes: Self-host via Docker (set AUDIOBOOKSHELF_AUDIOBOOK_PATH) or connect to existing (set AUDIOBOOKSHELF_URL + AUDIOBOOKSHELF_API_KEY).
